SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-08-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PLAINTIFF TO SUBMIT ALL EVIDENCE BY DECLARATION AND DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE TO JUN-14-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JACINTO JOSE VALDOVINO IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT JASON DEWITT (SPECIAL APPEARANCE) IS PRESENT (VIA UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM). PLAINTIFF'S GIRLFRIEND BRITTANY GIBSON ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF VALDOVINO INFORMED COURT PRIOR TO HEARING BY PHONE STATING PLAINTIFF IS INCARCERATED AND HE IS NOT ALLOWED TO APPEAR VIA ZOOM DUE TO RESTRICTIONS FROM PRISON AND THAT HE MAY NOT APPEAR VIA ZOOM FOR TODAY'S HEARING. DEFENDANT JASON DEWITT SPECIALLY APPEAR CONTESTING ON PROPER SERVICE. COURT ORDERS PLAINTIFF'S PETITION FOR A WRIT OF HABEAS CORPUS AD TESTIFICANDUM RECEIVED ON 2-21-2023 IS DENIED. THE MATTER IS CONTINUED TO JUNE 14, 2023 TO PERMIT PLAINTIFF TO SUBMIT ALL EVIDENCE BY DECLARATION & DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISITING JUDGE: RONALD QUIDACHAY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-22-2023 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Donald Schwartz, Esq. is present for Appellant/Defendant, Jason Dewitt, who is also present.
Jacinto Jose Valdovino, Respondent/Plaintiff, is present. Counsel and all parties appear via Zoom video conference.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.

Mr. Schwartz expresses concerns on behalf of Appellant/Defendant, Jason Dewitt.

Mr. Valdovino, Respondent/Plaintiff, responds on his behalf.

The Court allows the parties to engage in settlement discussion amongst each other.

Mr. Schwartz, on behalf of Appellant, requested the Court to recuse itself. The Court DENIES the oral motion on the grounds that the Court did not engage in discussions and felt that it can be fair and impartial during the trial. The Court proceeds forward with the trial de novo.

Mr. Valdovino, Respondent/Plaintiff, testifies on his behalf.

Mr. Schwartz conducts cross examination to Mr. Valdovino.

Mr. Schwartz conducts examination to Mr. Dewitt.

Mr. Valdovino asks follow-up questions to Mr. Dewitt.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court rules in favor of Respondent/Plaintiff with modification and additional term orders.

Judge: Hon. Christopher C. Hite; Clerk: KCColobong; Not reported (D318).
